name: @repo/kinetic-center-build
description: A KineticCenterBuild text animation component for SmoothUI.

useCases: Apple keynote-style word builds for hero headings
Short three-word editorial phrases with kinetic push
Centered typography builds for feature highlights
compositionHints: Best on 2-4 word phrases; longer phrases may overflow on mobile
Use large font sizes (48px+) for the push motion to read clearly
